User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the LaunchCode AI platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

displayName.description: The name displayed to identify the user.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user last logged in.

subscription.description: The user's subscription plan (free, pro, enterprise).

reportsGenerated.description: The number of reports generated by the user.

reportsRemaining.description: The number of reports remaining for the user's subscription.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Represents a startup validation report generated by the platform.

id.description: Unique identifier for the report entity.

companyName.description: The name of the company being analyzed.

description.description: The user-provided description of the company.

industry.description: The industry or sector the company belongs to.

targetMarket.description: The target market for the company's products or services.

location.description: The proposed headquarters or primary operating location.

stage.description: The current stage of the company (idea, MVP, beta, revenue-generating).

content.description: The generated content for each report section, stored as markdown.

scores.description: The scores assigned to the report, including rationale.

status.description: The status of the report generation process (draft, generating, complete, error).

isPromoted.description: Whether the user has chosen to promote this idea on the homepage.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the report was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the report was last updated.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Represents a message in a report's chat history.

role.description: The role of the message sender.

content.description: The text content of the message.

createdAt.description: The time the message was sent.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles. Users can access their own profile; admins have full read access.

/users/{userId}/reports/{reportId}.description: Stores reports generated by each user. Private to owners and readable by admins.

/users/{userId}/reports/{reportId}/messa.description: Stores chat history for a specific report. Private to owners and readable by admins.
